title: Who is WardrobeWinter? Meet Plaqueboymax’s roommate at Kai Cenat’s Streamer University 2026
summary_full: WardrobeWinter became one of the biggest breakout creators from Kai Cenat’s Streamer University 2026. Already popular on TikTok and Twitch, he drew even more attention after his roommate clashes with Plaqueboymax. With help from counsellor YourRAGE, the two talked through their problems, agreed on simple ground rules and eventually ended the situation with a hug.
